tasks.title: Install arduino-cli + ESP32 core + U8g2

Case v2: buttons + LED holes at OLED/top end

Bigger PST clock — verified on hardware (board #2)
Flash 2-player Snake to boards #1 + #2 (head-to-head)
Commit Rust clock improvements (PST + big font)
Publish site to GitHub Pages (auto-deploy)
Add chip-temp + battery-voltage readout to Rust clock
Add shop/board (AliExpress) URL to the site
Mesh benchmark HUD → folded into unified Rust firmware
Case v3: LED holes → USB-C end (board photo confirmed)
app-pixels-style modes/apps gallery on the site
Resin + watch-case enclosure guide (docs/enclosure-resin.md)
Unified Rust firmware: Clock + Snake + Bench + OLED 180° (compiles)
Case v4: crown + classic orientation — DONE (body+lid+crown, watertight)
Flash unified firmware (12h/AM-PM + °F) to boards #1 (id8) + #2 (id7)
Re-render final case (bail-up) + crown on site
Wrap-up: root README, docs/BUILDING.md, render tool, refreshed memory

Mesh time sync (#1): SMOLv1 TIME frame, newest-NTP-wins (loop-free) — compile + clippy clean; 3-way mesh VERIFIED 2026-07-07 across all three boards (id8/id9 adopt id7's synced_at over ESP-NOW; adoption proven 3×, logged on issue #4); shipped in build 36

Magical node names (#2): realm-sigil port, display-only fantasy realm — compile-verified; flashed on all three boards: id7 = 'Draconic Dominion', id8 = 'Eldritch Nexus', id9 = 'Jade Herald'; shipped in build 36, and now paired with forge-realm VERSION names on the boot splash

ESP-NOW → internet relay bridge (#3): single-hop telemetry, leaf → RELAY fragments → gateway → UDP over WiFi burst. LAN UDP collector + status page COMMITTED (1943457, 19 tests). Gateway path VERIFIED: wave-3 fixed a too-short DHCP budget (6s→15s — hardware-vindicated a review prediction); wave-4 fixed the drain race. E2E HARDWARE-PROVEN + SUSTAINED — first leaf rows 02:06Z, still flowing at 02:44Z across a firmware upgrade (18+ node8 rows; leaf→gateway→WiFi→collector). One follow-up filed: cold-ARP first-round retry (pre-warm), next session.

MMO mesh snake (#5): shared 256×256 toroidal world, scrolling viewport, 18 B SNK self-broadcast @5 Hz jittered, dead-reckoned peers, mesh leaderboard (score≡length), + six treasure-powers (Wraith Veil…Phoenix Ember, §11 durations) — ALL IN CODE + committed (6baea36 + phasing fix 877b2af, Wraith Veil phasing tested 52/52); compile-verified (3 builds, default/wifi byte-identical). FLASHED + running on all three boards (waves 3+4) as part of unified firmware v2; live multiplayer-gameplay verification still to log.

Flash the mesh firmware to the fleet: id7 'Draconic Dominion' (gateway) + id8 'Eldritch Nexus' (leaf) both flashed + verified today on the unified mesh firmware; mesh-time adoption proven 3× (incl. on the new firmware)

OTA firmware updates (#6): research verdict = pin-compatible path (esp-bootloader-esp-idf + esp-storage, ~M effort); UX designed — WiFi-burst fetch + rollback. Spike verdict (a): the bundled bootloader DOES slot-select → #6 de-risked. The sigil VERSION-name splash is LIVE on hardware — boot shows `build 36 "Oxidized Spark" (bcafa7e)`, forge realm; three forge names in one day as the code evolved (Pressed Jig → Riveted Jig → Oxidized Spark — provenance visibly working). The update mechanism is next to build.

Plugin/mode framework (#7): enum-delegation registry — LANDED on build 36: atomic mode-switch, a shared About screen, a 4-entry scrolling menu, Bench mesh-view pages. Oracle final gate CLEAN — behavior-preserving, independently rebuilt byte-exact default ELF, all six screens verbatim-verified.
Bench mesh-view (#8): per-node table — magical noun, RSSI, sync state, role (gateway/leaf). LANDED aboard build 36 (rides the plugin framework); Oracle-gated.
Flash board id9 'Jade Herald' for a 3-way ESP-NOW mesh — DONE 2026-07-07: all three boards flashed, 3-way mesh proven (logged on issue #4)
Wire battery + TP4056 and print/assemble the pocket-watch case
